settings_profile_information_description: Manage your personal data and preferences associated with your account.
settings_profile_appearance_description: Choose between light or dark mode to customize the platform.

settings_business_logo_description: Manage your business logo. Upload, view, or delete your current logo.
settings_business_currency_description: Select the default currency for pricing and billing
settings_contact_digital_contact_descrip: Manage your business emails and website.
settings_contact_digital_contact_email_c: This email will be used for notifications and communications, and will also be displayed on your website and in your AI chat so people can contact you.

settings_contact_social_media_descriptio: Add your business's social media profiles.

settings_schedules_description: Define your business's opening and closing hours. You can add up to two time slots per day.
settings_users_delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
invalid_email_format: The email format is not valid
settings_users_invite_description: Send an invitation to join your team.
settings_location_description: Manage your business address and Google Maps link.
settings_location_physical_location_desc: Manage the physical address of your business.
settings_location_google_maps_descriptio: Add the Google Maps URL to display your location.
